description: Trending audio and music selection patterns for viral short-form video

rules.title: Trending Audio = Algorithmic Boost
rules.description: Videos using trending audio receive 2.4x more impressions on TikTok. The algorithm actively pushes content using sounds with velocity (rapid saves/uses). Peak window is 48-72h after a sound starts trending.

rules.title: Audio Hook in First 3 Seconds
rules.description: The audio drop, beat change, or voiceover reveal in the first 3 seconds creates a retention spike. Videos that delay audio hook past 3s lose 31% of viewers before it lands.

rules.title: 85% Watch Without Sound — Optimize for Both
rules.description: 85% of Facebook and 40% of TikTok views happen without audio. Content must work visually with captions while also rewarding audio-on viewers with extra value (music, voice energy).

rules.title: Original Audio Builds Creator Authority
rules.description: Creators who produce original sounds that others use gain compound reach. Original audio saves correlate 0.73 with follower conversion rate. Encourage unique voiceover styles over generic music.

rules.title: Music BPM Must Match Edit Pacing
rules.description: Cut frequency should align with music tempo. 120-140 BPM for fast cuts (2-3s/cut), 80-100 BPM for medium cuts (4-6s/cut). Mismatched BPM/cut rate reduces watch time by 18%.

rules.title: Voice Energy is Retention Signal
rules.description: Monotone voiceover loses 44% of viewers by second 15. Dynamic voice (pitch variation, strategic pauses, emphasis on key words) keeps completion rate 2.1x higher. Sentence-end drops lose attention.

rules.title: KR/SEA: Music-First Content Strategy
rules.description: Korea and Southeast Asia audiences engage with music-driven content 3.2x more than talk-first. Music sets emotional context before hook. Lyrics and music reactions outperform pure commentary.

rules.title: Loopable Audio Drives Replay Rate
rules.description: Audio that loops seamlessly (no abrupt end) increases TikTok replay rate by 34%. Continuous music without a definitive ending tricks the autoplay loop. Replay rate >15% = major distribution signal.
